summary: Iteration 4 complete. AI Event Cover Image Generation feature shipped. All 4 user stories (US-4-1 through US-4-4) delivered. 15/15 acceptance criteria pass. Backend (10/10 tests), frontend (7/7 tests), widget ACs (8/8 verified). Zero bugs. Clean Architecture layers compliant. Merged PR #11 to main.

artifacts.purpose: Iteration wrap-up: delivered stories, test results, tech lead verdict, PR link

artifacts.name: ITERATION_HISTORY.md
artifacts.purpose: Updated history table with Iteration 4 row (date, status, PR #11 link, one-liner)

artifacts.name: PRODUCT_STATUS.md
artifacts.purpose: Product roadmap update: shipped features, coming soon, known limitations, test coverage, architecture health

artifacts.name: iteration_context_4.md
artifacts.purpose: Iteration 5 handoff bridge: what works (no rework), deferred work, tech debt, API contracts, localization keys reference

artifacts.name: iteration_checkpoint.md
artifacts.purpose: Reset to idle; last closed = Iteration 4; next = Iteration 5

artifacts.purpose: Updated shipped features table, deployment links, quick start guide, development commands

artifacts.purpose: This contract document (quality gates, metrics, artifacts)

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: All 6 handoff documents created: ITERATION_SUMMARY_4.md, ITERATION_HISTORY.md, PRODUCT_STATUS.md, iteration_context_4.md, iteration_checkpoint.md (reset), README.md (updated), state.json (updated)

qualityGates.name: iteration_docs_published
qualityGates.notes: ITERATION_SUMMARY_4.md published in docs/; ITERATION_HISTORY.md appended with Iteration 4 row; PRODUCT_STATUS.md published; iteration_context_4.md published for Iteration 5 handoff

qualityGates.name: all_stories_delivered
qualityGates.notes: 4/4 user stories shipped: US-4-1 (AI button + loading), US-4-2 (regenerate/replace), US-4-3 (backend endpoint), US-4-4 (state refactor). 15/15 acceptance criteria pass. Zero deferred.

qualityGates.name: test_gates_green
qualityGates.notes: Backend tests 10/10 pass. Frontend domain unit tests 7/7 pass. Widget ACs 8/8 verified via code review. dart analyze 0 new violations (34 pre-existing unrelated). flutter test 7/7 pass. No regressions.

qualityGates.name: tech_lead_approval
qualityGates.notes: PR #11 approved (2026-05-13). Tech lead review passed. 1 blocking fix applied inline (prefer_const_constructors). Clean Architecture compliant (domain/data/presentation layers, no violations). Merged to main.

qualityGates.name: no_blocking_bugs
qualityGates.notes: Zero bugs filed. All acceptance criteria pass. No blockers at merge. Iteration shipped cleanly.

qualityGates.name: po_handoff_complete
qualityGates.notes: PO close phase complete. All required documents written. Iteration context bridge published for Iteration 5. Tech debt and deferred work documented.
